tasks.dev: deno install && ./node_modules/.bin/concurrently -k "deno task dev:vite" "deno task dev:electron"
tasks.dev:electron: ./node_modules/.bin/wait-on tcp:5173 && deno task build:electron && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 ./node_modules/.bin/electron dist-electron/main.cjs
tasks.build: deno install && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -b && ./node_modules/.bin/vite build && deno task build:electron
